---
title: "Cross-dataset averaging (v02)"
author: "Gabriel"
date: "2026-06-11"
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    code-fold: false
    embed-resources: true
---

Reads `rem_coefs_by_seed.csv` and `rhem_coefs_by_seed.csv` from the batch script.
Band = `BAND_K * SD(REM estimate at MR = 0)` per statistic.

## Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

project_root <- normalizePath(file.path("..", ".."), mustWork = TRUE)
cd_dir <- file.path(project_root, "code", "data", "synthetic", "cross_dataset")

rem_csv  <- file.path(cd_dir, "rem_coefs_by_seed.csv")
rhem_csv <- file.path(cd_dir, "rhem_coefs_by_seed.csv")

stopifnot(file.exists(rem_csv), file.exists(rhem_csv))

# true generating values and the order we want the statistics shown in
TRUE_PARAMS <- c(
  inertia = 0.02, reciprocity = 0.10, otp = 0.03,
  difference_active = 0.15, same_group = 0.40
)
STAT_ORDER <- names(TRUE_PARAMS)

BAND_K     <- 2                   # band = 2 * SD of the REM estimate at MR = 0
RULE_GRID  <- c(0, 2, 8, 16, 24)  # the MR levels we actually simulated
RHEM_SCALE <- "raw"               # compare REM and RHEM on the untransformed scale
```

## Load

```{r}
#| label: load

rem  <- read.csv(rem_csv,  stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
rhem <- read.csv(rhem_csv, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

n_seeds_rem  <- length(unique(rem$seed))
n_seeds_rhem <- length(unique(rhem$seed))

data.frame(
  model   = c("REM", "RHEM"),
  n_seeds = c(n_seeds_rem, n_seeds_rhem),
  n_rows  = c(nrow(rem), nrow(rhem))
)
```

## Per-effect band (MR = 0)

```{r}
#| label: band-derive

band_tbl <- rem |>
  filter(mr_level_pct == 0, statistic %in% STAT_ORDER) |>
  group_by(statistic) |>
  summarise(sd_at_mr0 = sd(estimate), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(
    true_value = TRUE_PARAMS[statistic],
    band = BAND_K * sd_at_mr0
  ) |>
  arrange(factor(statistic, levels = STAT_ORDER))

knitr::kable(band_tbl, digits = 4)

BAND <- setNames(band_tbl$band, band_tbl$statistic)
```

## Cross-seed averages

```{r}
#| label: rem-average

rem_avg <- rem |>
  filter(statistic %in% STAT_ORDER) |>
  group_by(mr_level_pct, statistic) |>
  summarise(
    n_seeds       = n(),
    mean_estimate = mean(estimate),
    sd_estimate   = sd(estimate),
    mc_se         = sd(estimate) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    true_value  = TRUE_PARAMS[statistic],
    mean_bias   = mean_estimate - true_value,
    band        = BAND[statistic],
    within_band = abs(mean_bias) <= band,
    model       = "REM"
  )

knitr::kable(
  rem_avg |> arrange(mr_level_pct, factor(statistic, levels = STAT_ORDER)),
  digits = 4
)
```

```{r}
#| label: rhem-average

rhem_avg <- rhem |>
  filter(scale == RHEM_SCALE, effect %in% STAT_ORDER) |>
  group_by(mr_level_pct, effect) |>
  summarise(
    n_seeds       = n(),
    mean_estimate = mean(estimate_aligned),
    sd_estimate   = sd(estimate_aligned),
    mc_se         = sd(estimate_aligned) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  rename(statistic = effect) |>
  mutate(
    true_value  = TRUE_PARAMS[statistic],
    mean_bias   = mean_estimate - true_value,
    band        = BAND[statistic],
    within_band = abs(mean_bias) <= band,
    model       = "RHEM"
  )

knitr::kable(
  rhem_avg |> arrange(mr_level_pct, factor(statistic, levels = STAT_ORDER)),
  digits = 4
)
```

## Bias vs MR (REM and RHEM)

```{r}
#| label: threshold-plot
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

combined <- bind_rows(
  rem_avg  |> select(model, mr_level_pct, statistic, mean_bias, mc_se, band),
  rhem_avg |> select(model, mr_level_pct, statistic, mean_bias, mc_se, band)
) |>
  mutate(statistic = factor(statistic, levels = STAT_ORDER))

band_rects <- combined |> distinct(statistic, band)

ggplot(combined, aes(x = mr_level_pct, y = mean_bias, colour = model)) +
  geom_rect(
    data = band_rects,
    aes(xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -band, ymax = band),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, fill = "grey70", alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_bias - 2 * mc_se, ymax = mean_bias + 2 * mc_se), width = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ statistic, scales = "free_y", nrow = 2) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(REM = "#1f77b4", RHEM = "#d62728")) +
  labs(
    x = "MR level (%)",
    y = "Mean bias (estimate - truth)",
    colour = "Model"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
```

## Normalised view: |bias| / band (REM only)

```{r}
#| label: normalised-threshold-plot
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

norm_rem <- rem_avg |>
  mutate(
    bias_ratio    = abs(mean_bias) / band,
    bias_ratio_lo = pmax(0, (abs(mean_bias) - 2 * mc_se) / band),
    bias_ratio_hi = (abs(mean_bias) + 2 * mc_se) / band,
    statistic     = factor(statistic, levels = STAT_ORDER),
    on_rule_grid  = mr_level_pct %in% RULE_GRID
  )

threshold_mark <- norm_rem |>
  filter(on_rule_grid) |>
  group_by(mr_level_pct) |>
  summarise(all_within = all(bias_ratio <= 1), .groups = "drop") |>
  filter(all_within) |>
  pull(mr_level_pct) |>
  max()

stat_col <- c(
  inertia           = "#0072B2",
  reciprocity       = "#E69F00",
  otp               = "#009E73",
  difference_active = "#D55E00",
  same_group        = "#CC79A7"
)

make_norm_plot <- function(base_size, line_w, point_s, err_w, err_x, ref_w,
                           colours = stat_col) {
  ref_colour <- "grey40"
  fail_alpha <- 0.10

  p <- ggplot(norm_rem, aes(x = mr_level_pct, y = bias_ratio,
                            colour = statistic, group = statistic)) +
    annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = 1, ymax = Inf,
             fill = "#d62728", alpha = fail_alpha) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", colour = ref_colour,
               linewidth = ref_w) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = threshold_mark, linetype = "dotted",
               colour = ref_colour, linewidth = ref_w) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = bias_ratio_lo, ymax = bias_ratio_hi),
                  width = err_x, linewidth = err_w, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_line(linewidth = line_w) +
    geom_point(size = point_s, stroke = 0) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = colours, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = sort(unique(norm_rem$mr_level_pct))) +
    labs(
      x = "Multi-receiver proportion (%)",
      y = expression("|bias| / band" ~ (1.0 ~ "= band edge")),
      colour = "Statistic"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.key.width  = unit(1.6, "lines"),
      legend.key.height = unit(0.8, "lines"),
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = ref_w * 0.7, colour = "black"),
      axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = ref_w * 0.5),
      axis.text = element_text(colour = "black"),
      axis.title = element_text(colour = "black", face = "bold"),
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.margin = margin(10, 14, 10, 14)
    )

  p
}

p_norm <- make_norm_plot(
  base_size = 11, line_w = 0.7, point_s = 2,
  err_w = 0.4, err_x = 0.8, ref_w = 0.5
)

p_norm

fig_dir <- file.path(project_root, "code", "03_evaluation_and_reporting", "figures")
dir.create(fig_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

ggsave(
  file.path(fig_dir, "cross_dataset_normalised_threshold_v02.png"),
  p_norm, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300
)
```

## Threshold table

Largest MR on `RULE_GRID` where every REM statistic is within band.

```{r}
#| label: threshold-calc

rem_pass <- rem_avg |>
  mutate(bias_to_band = abs(mean_bias) / band) |>
  group_by(mr_level_pct) |>
  summarise(
    all_within  = all(abs(mean_bias) <= band),
    worst_stat  = statistic[which.max(bias_to_band)],
    worst_ratio = max(bias_to_band),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(on_rule_grid = mr_level_pct %in% RULE_GRID) |>
  arrange(mr_level_pct)

knitr::kable(rem_pass, digits = 4)

rule_pass <- rem_pass |> filter(on_rule_grid)
threshold <- rule_pass |> filter(all_within) |> pull(mr_level_pct) |> max(na.rm = TRUE)
if (!is.finite(threshold)) threshold <- NA

threshold
```

## Save summary CSV

```{r}
#| label: save

summary_all <- bind_rows(
  rem_avg |> mutate(model = "REM",  bias_ratio = abs(mean_bias) / band,
                    on_rule_grid = mr_level_pct %in% RULE_GRID, rhem_scale = NA),
  rhem_avg |> mutate(model = "RHEM", bias_ratio = abs(mean_bias) / band,
                     on_rule_grid = mr_level_pct %in% RULE_GRID, rhem_scale = RHEM_SCALE)
)

out_csv <- file.path(cd_dir, "cross_dataset_summary_v02.csv")
write.csv(summary_all, out_csv, row.names = FALSE)
out_csv
```
